title: Watch: Dubai Police seize vehicles, impose Dh50,000 fines for reckless stunts during rain
summary_full: Dubai Police have cracked down on drivers performing dangerous stunts during recent rainfall, impounding vehicles and issuing hefty fines.  Motorists engaged in reckless maneuvers like drifting on wet roads faced severe penalties, highlighting the emirate's zero-tolerance policy for actions endangering public safety. Authorities urge caution, not stunts, during adverse weather.
